message:
feat(edgeboxc): add --output-dir option for concurrent builds

Add --output-dir option to edgeboxc to allow isolated build directories,
preventing cache conflicts when multiple builds run in parallel.

Changes:
- Add -Dcache-prefix option to build.zig for frozen module paths
- Add --output-dir argument to edgeboxc CLI
- Pass --prefix, --cache-dir, and -Dcache-prefix to zig build
- Fix Zig 0.15 compilation issues in polyfills:
  - child_process.zig: var -> const for unmutated entry
  - tls.zig: fix CertificateVerify buffer size (68 -> 72)
  - tls.zig: remove non-existent error from switch
